body:
Dear valued customer,

We are writing to inform you about a potential security breach affecting your account.

Your password has been reset, and your login credentials have been compromised. To ensure the safety of your financial data, please click the link below to verify your identity immediately:

http://www.silverstate.co.sy@search.ph-search.ph/search.php?id=sicosyl

Once verified, you will receive a confirmation email shortly.

Please do not share your passwords with anyone, including IT support or our support team.

If you have already clicked this link, please disregard it as it is a warning message designed to harvest your information.

Regards,

IT Support <it-support@company.com>
subject: Account security alert - password reset required
label: phishing
